title: Open a session, exec "pwd"
transcript:
> connected to tcp://127.0.0.1:12222
> SSH-2.0-atto-demo-client_1.0
< SSH-2.0-atto-ssh-demo_1.0
> KEXINIT (offering curve25519-sha256, ssh-ed25519, aes128-ctr, hmac-sha2-256-etm)
< KEXINIT
> KEX_ECDH_INIT (sending Q_C, 32 bytes)
< KEX_ECDH_REPLY (host key SHA256:7rjuKFBCPHz8iwD1PRFRghacu-sliFlQKbgpl-7hGoc)
  Ed25519 host-key signature verified
> NEWKEYS
< NEWKEYS
  transport encrypted: aes128-ctr + hmac-sha2-256-etm
> SERVICE_REQUEST ssh-userauth
< SERVICE_ACCEPT ssh-userauth
> USERAUTH_REQUEST (password) for alice
< USERAUTH_SUCCESS
> CHANNEL_OPEN session
< CHANNEL_OPEN_CONFIRMATION
> CHANNEL_REQUEST exec "pwd"
< CHANNEL_SUCCESS
< exit-status = 0
< CHANNEL_EOF
< CHANNEL_CLOSE

--- stdout ---
/users/alice

--- exit-status: 0

! failed to load key from /opt/homebrew/var/www/git/atto_servers/examples/24 SSH Demo/keys/alice_demo_key
